mapper.select: SELECT id, script_id, script_name, script_type, script_language, enable, sort, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, remark, version FROM liteflow_script WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time >= #{timeFrom} AND create_time <= #{timeTo} AND id = #{id} AND script_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{scriptId}, '%') AND script_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{scriptName}, '%') AND script_type = #{scriptType} AND script_language = #{scriptLanguage} AND enable = #{enable} ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
